system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet_getbynum","body":"
CREATE PROC [dbo].[DQT_PALLET_CHITIET_GETBYNUM](@sophieu nvarchar(max))
AS
BEGIN

	SELECT A.*, 
		--D.fsc_name, 
		--C.nguongoc,
		B.nguyenlieu, 
		sothanh_conlai = COALESCE(sothanh, 0) - COALESCE(sothanh_daxuat, 0),
		--sokhoi_conlai = (A.dayy*A.rong*A.dai*(A.sothanh - A.sothanh_daxuat)) / 1000000000,
		sokhoi_conlai = COALESCE(A.sokhoi, 0) - COALESCE(A.sokhoi_daxuat, 0),
		isSanXuat = IIF(A.phanloai = N'Sản xuất', CONVERT(bit, 1), CONVERT(bit, 0)),
		isHangRot = IIF(A.phanloai = N'Hàng rớt', CONVERT(bit, 1), CONVERT(bit, 0)),
		isHangFinger = IIF(A.phanloai = N'Hàng finger', CONVERT(bit, 1), CONVERT(bit, 0))
	INTO #PALLET_CHITIET
	FROM dqt_pallet_chitiet A
		INNER JOIN tr_nguyenlieu_gva B ON A.id_nguyenlieu = B.id
		--LEFT JOIN tr_nguongoc C ON A.xuatxu = C.id
		--LEFT JOIN tr_tinhtrang_fsc D ON A.fsc_id = D.fsc_id
	WHERE A.sophieu IN (SELECT RTRIM(LTRIM([value])) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@sophieu, ',')) 
		AND A.active = 1
	--ORDER BY A.donhang, A.dayy, A.rong, A.dai

	SELECT A.madonhang, A.malo_nguyenlieu, C.nguongoc, D.fsc_name
	INTO #PHOI_DAUVAO
	FROM dqt_thongke_phoi A
		LEFT JOIN tr_nguongoc C ON A.xuatxu = C.id
		LEFT JOIN tr_tinhtrang_fsc D ON A.fsc_id = D.fsc_id
	WHERE A.madonhang IN (SELECT donhang FROM #PALLET_CHITIET)
		AND LEN(A.madonhang) > 0

	-- MÃ LÔ NGUYÊN LIỆU
	SELECT madonhang, malo_nguyenlieu = STRING_AGG(malo_nguyenlieu, ', ')
	INTO #DONHANG_MALO
	FROM (
		SELECT madonhang, malo_nguyenlieu FROM #PHOI_DAUVAO GROUP BY madonhang, malo_nguyenlieu
	) A GROUP BY madonhang

	-- NGUỒN GỐC
	SELECT madonhang, nguongoc = STRING_AGG(nguongoc, ', ')
	INTO #DONHANG_NGUONGOC
	FROM (
		SELECT madonhang, nguongoc FROM #PHOI_DAUVAO GROUP BY madonhang, nguongoc
	) A GROUP BY madonhang

	-- TÌNH TRẠNG FSC
	SELECT madonhang, fsc_name = STRING_AGG(fsc_name, ', ')
	INTO #DONHANG_FSC
	FROM (
		SELECT madonhang, fsc_name FROM #PHOI_DAUVAO GROUP BY madonhang, fsc_name
	) A GROUP BY madonhang

	SELECT A.*, B.malo_nguyenlieu AS malo_nguyenlieu1,
		C.nguongoc, D.fsc_name,
		non_fsc = CASE WHEN CHARINDEX(N'Non FSC', D.fsc_name) > 0 THEN CONVERT(bit, 1) ELSE CONVERT(bit, 0) END,
		fsc_100 = CASE WHEN CHARINDEX(N'FSC 100%', D.fsc_name) > 0 THEN CONVERT(bit, 1) ELSE CONVERT(bit, 0) END,
		fsc_mix = CASE WHEN CHARINDEX(N'FSC Mix', D.fsc_name) > 0 THEN CONVERT(bit, 1) ELSE CONVERT(bit, 0) END,
		fsc_recycled = CASE WHEN CHARINDEX(N'FSC Recycled', D.fsc_name) > 0 THEN CONVERT(bit, 1) ELSE CONVERT(bit, 0) END
	FROM #PALLET_CHITIET A
		LEFT JOIN #DONHANG_MALO B ON A.donhang = B.madonhang
		LEFT JOIN #DONHANG_NGUONGOC C ON A.donhang = C.madonhang
		LEFT JOIN #DONHANG_FSC D ON A.donhang = D.madonhang
	ORDER BY A.donhang, A.dayy, A.rong, A.dai

	DROP TABLE #PALLET_CHITIET, #PHOI_DAUVAO, #DONHANG_FSC, #DONHANG_NGUONGOC, #DONHANG_MALO;
END
","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.string_split","dbo.tr_nguongoc","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["has-group-by","has-temp-table"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
